episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 525: Secret Lair Chaos Vault Experiments
episode.description:
The boys catch you up on all the Magic the Gathering card price action of the week, including meta updates, cards to watch and handle the debrief on the recent Chaos Vault alternate sales experiment on the Secret Lair site.

Intro/Outro Music by Skylarka
